title: SACRAMENTO, CA –
prompt_preview:

Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Telehealth services have transformed the health care delivery system, especially during a global pandemic.",
    "Telehealth has allowed providers to bring care to patients, regardless of their barriers such as a lack of local health professionals or mobility issues.",
    "Telehealth has transformed healthcare during the nation’s worst health crisis in a century.",
    "Telehealth has become an integral part of California’s public health care system.",
    "Telehealth is critical to addressing health disparities laid bare by COVID-19.",
    "Access to telehealth should not be determined by geographic location, type of phone, or insurance type.",
    "Telehealth flexibilities granted during the COVID-19 pandemic have enabled physicians to provide and expand care to Californians.",
    "Telehealth bridges access barriers by utilizing technology to better harness physician time and expertise.",
    "Telehealth allows patients to connect to their care providers more quickly, efficiently, and conveniently.",
    "Telephonic care plays a crucial role in bridging access barriers in healthcare.",
    "Telehealth adoption during the pandemic has reduced barriers to receiving essential services for patients across the state.",
    "Telephonic care has become a powerful tool to bridge the gap in care for health center patients, particularly for BIPOC and rural communities.",
    "BIPOC and rural communities have been able to access needed primary care and behavioral health services due to the transition to telehealth."
  ]
}
```
